data.title: Migrate capture-review-diff.sh to shared library (HEAD-anchored)
data.description:
Replace inline MERGE_HEAD detection (~lines 51-64) and REBASE_HEAD detection (~lines 71-93). Script is in plugins/dso/scripts/, source via: source "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../hooks/lib/merge-state.sh"

IMPORTANT: capture-review-diff.sh uses HEAD-anchored rebase algorithm (merge-base HEAD onto → diff merge-base..HEAD), which intentionally differs from other consumers (orig-head-anchored). Use ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head for the rebase path, NOT ms_get_worktree_only_files.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — substitutive refactor. Library HEAD variant replicates capture-review-diff.sh exact existing algorithm.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] No inline merge detection in executable lines
  Verify: grep -v '^\s*#' plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh | grep -qE '_merge_head_sha=|_merge_base=\$\(git|_rebase_onto=' && exit 1 || true
- [ ] Script sources merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh
- [ ] Existing merge-aware-diff tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh
